title: VPB Halo Winter Contingency
description: A pack for Vic's Point Blank that adds guns from Halo Reach
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/gxwD53W6r14" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
Halo Themed content pack for Vic's Point Blank (and now PointBlank: Jelly), adds all the UNSC weapons from Halo Reach!

HOW TO INSTALL:
1. Download the content pack
2. If you haven't already, create a folder in your ".minecraft" folder called "pointblank"
3. Drag & drop the content pack into the "pointblank" folder inside your ".minecraft" folder

DONE!
